args.code: (() => { const label = [...document.querySelectorAll('label')].find(l => l.textContent && l.textContent.includes('Repository name')); const input = label ? document.querySelector('#' + label.getAttribute('for')) || label.querySelector('input') || label.nextElementSibling?.querySelector('input') || [...label.parentElement.querySelectorAll('input')].find(i => i.type === 'text') : null; return {labelFound: !!label, inputFound: !!input, inputTag: input ? input.tagName : null, inputType: input ? input.type : null, inputId: input ? input.id : null, inputClass: input ? input.className.substring(0,50) : null}; })()
